component.name: MeedyaManager
component.summary: Smart cross-platform media file manager and auto-organizer

description.p: MeedyaManager is a cross-platform media file management application that automatically monitors folders, reads metadata from audio and video files, and renames or organizes them according to user-defined rules — similar to MusicBee's auto-organize feature, but available on Windows, macOS, and Linux.

ul.li: Real-time folder monitoring with file-lock awareness
MusicBee-inspired template engine with nested conditions
Metadata lookup from 19 providers (MusicBrainz, Discogs, TMDB, and more)
Cloud storage monitoring (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox)
Cover art display and tag editing
Dry-run preview before executing any renames
Update notifications in all platform UIs

description.p: Milestone 7 — Cloud Storage Monitoring (OneDrive, Google Drive, Dropbox).

screenshot.caption: Library / Scan panel with rename preview
